name: great-ideas
description: A minimal starter template for building AI-powered Slack agents with [Bolt for JavaScript](https://docs.slack.dev/tools/bolt-js/) and the [Claude Agent SDK](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/overview) using models from [Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com). Works with the [Slack MCP Server](https://github.com/slackapi/slack-mcp-server) to search messages, read channels, send messages, and manage canvases — all from within your agent.
author: vanessa

scripts.check: npx tsc --checkJs --noEmit --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --target esnext --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext app.js
